visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a large orange plush fox head, likely Nick Wilde from Zootopia, with half-closed eyes. A variety-show style overlay with the Costco logo and a cartoon figure appears in the center. The setting is an indoor warehouse environment with bright, flat overhead lighting. (2) A rapid montage begins, showcasing various food and beverage products stacked on warehouse shelves or inside refrigerated displays. Each shot features a new product stack: bags of dried fish snacks, boxes of coconut water, rows of chocolate containers, jars of coffee, and various snack boxes. The camera is mostly static or handheld with minor shakes. (3) The sequence continues through the refrigerated and bakery sections, showing boxes of pomelos, trays of grapes, stacks of bottled water, and various baked goods like bagels, croissants, and donuts. Blurred shoppers and warehouse staff move in the far background. (4) The final segment displays meat products in cold storage, frozen dumplings, various juices, tea, milk, and alcoholic beverages including wine and beer. The visual rhythm is extremely fast, with cuts occurring every 1.5 to 2 seconds, maintaining a consistent high-energy promotional style.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Multiple blurred figures and hands visible in the background shoppers in various aisles.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior featuring high industrial shelves, bulk pallets of goods, refrigerated display units, and bakery displays.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy pop/electronic music bed featuring a driving 4/4 beat. A male narrator introduces the segment with a very fast speech rate and high vocal arousal, speaking in Traditional Chinese with an excited, promotional tone. (2) As the products cycle visually, the narrator rapidly lists each item and its corresponding discounted price. The speech is continuous with almost no pauses, synchronized with the fast visual cuts. (3) Occasional 'pop' and 'whoosh' sound effects are added in post-production to emphasize price drops or scene transitions. The background music remains consistent throughout, providing a rhythmic backbone to the narration. (4) The track concludes with a final energetic CTA from the narrator, maintaining high volume and clarity until the very end, with the music fading out quickly after the last word.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Product List -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform consumers about the weekly promotional offers and discounts at Costco Taiwan for the period of October 6th to October 12th, and to encourage viewers to follow the channel for more updates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly promotes Costco's weekly specials and displays prices and brand logos throughout.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a typical social media promotional short video characterized by high information density and fast pacing to capture attention quickly.
